Legal_3: («we», «us», «our service») collects, uses, and protects the personal data of website users.
Legal_5: We only collect the data that you voluntarily provide through forms on the website, including:
Legal_6: WhatsApp number (country code and phone number);
Legal_9: other information you provide in your message/application (if applicable).
Legal_11: We use your data for the following purposes:
Legal_12: to contact you regarding your request and provide you with a property selection;
Legal_13: to offer consultation on purchasing/investing/renting real estate in Phuket;
Legal_14: to improve the quality of our service and communication with clients.
Legal_16: The processing of personal data is carried out based on your consent (marking in the form), as well as for the purposes of fulfilling your request (callback/message and property selection).
Legal_18: We do not sell your personal data. Access to the data may be provided only to:
Legal_19: our employees/representatives responsible for processing applications;
Legal_20: technical contractors (hosting/support), solely for the purpose of ensuring the operation of the website;
Legal_21: if required by law or at the request of authorized authorities.
Legal_23: We store your data for as long as necessary to process your request and maintain communication, or until you withdraw your consent, unless otherwise required by law.
Legal_25: We implement reasonable organizational and technical measures to protect your data from unauthorized access, modification, or destruction.
Legal_27: You can request access to your data, correction or deletion of it, and also withdraw your consent for processing. To do this, please contact us in any convenient way.

projects.desc_balcony:
Balcony — Naiyang is a resort-style condominium located in a peaceful area near the beach and Phuket International Airport. The project combines proximity to nature with modern comfort and strong investment potential.

Designed in a tropical resort style, the development features lush green areas, a lagoon-style swimming pool, and thoughtfully designed common spaces created for a calm and relaxed lifestyle.
projects.desc_vibe-karon:
Vibe Residence — Karon is a resort-style luxury development just 200 meters from the beach, located in the heart of the vibrant Karon area. 

The project is situated within walking distance of Karon Beach, the park, and Phuket’s most lively destinations, offering a high level of comfort, convenience, and coastal living. Convenient access to Patong and Phuket Town.
projects.desc_halo_1_naiyang:
The Halo 1 — Naiyang is a resort-style condominium that combines privacy, tranquility, and harmony with nature. Surrounded by greenery, its thoughtfully designed common areas create a peaceful and relaxing atmosphere.

The architecture, featuring distinctive gabled roofs and an elegant Skin Façade inspired by Phuket’s heritage, blends modern design with local character.
projects.desc_heritage_bang_tao:
Heritage — Bang Tao is a resort condominium located in a prestigious area near Boat Avenue, Porto de Phuket, and Laguna Phuket, designed in a contemporary style with Sino-inspired elements.

With well-developed infrastructure, close proximity to Bang Tao, Surin, and Layan beaches (5–10 minutes), and convenient access to Phuket International Airport (approximately 35 minutes), the project is an excellent choice for both living and investment.
projects.desc_legendary_bang_tao:
Legendary — Bang Tao is a modern residential development in the prestigious Bang Tao area, just minutes from the beach and close to key infrastructure and the Laguna Phuket complex.

nThe project combines stylish interiors with over 35 resort-level facilities, including swimming pools, a fitness center, clubhouse, coworking spaces, and children’s areas — offering both a comfortable lifestyle and strong investment appeal.
projects.desc_serenity_naiyang:
Serenity — Naiyang is a contemporary resort-style condominium near Phuket International Airport and the island’s northern beaches. The project blends stylish design, comfort, and a convenient location.

Residents enjoy extensive leisure facilities, including swimming pools, a fitness center, spa areas, onsen, and lifestyle spaces. Naiyang Beach is just 5 minutes away, with restaurants, shops, and a local market within walking distance.
projects.desc_modeva_bang_tao:
Modeva — Bang Tao is a stylish tropical development with a marine-inspired concept, where buildings are surrounded by winding swimming pools and a lush central green area, creating the atmosphere of a private island retreat.
The complex offers resort-style facilities, including swimming pools, a fitness center, onsen, coworking spaces, children’s areas, and community zones. Located within walking distance of Bang Tao Beach, it is an attractive option for both living and investment.
projects.desc_cielo_rawai:
Cielo — Rawai is a premium coastal condominium in southern Phuket, an area known for its scenic landscapes and stunning sunsets. Rawai combines an active lifestyle with a cozy and authentic local atmosphere.

The project harmoniously integrates modern architecture with the natural beauty of the coastline, offering comfortable living and strong investment potential.
projects.desc_artrio_bang_tao:
Artrio — Bang Tao is a development by a reliable developer in the heart of Bang Tao, near Porto de Phuket, Boat Avenue, and Laguna Phuket.

The project features modern residences with well-designed layouts, suitable for both comfortable living and investment. All key infrastructure is within walking distance, while Bang Tao, Surin, and Layan beaches are just 10 minutes away.
projects.desc_katabello_kata:
Katabello — Kata is a resort-style condominium in central Kata with developed infrastructure and pet-friendly living conditions.

Surrounded by canal-style swimming pools, the complex offers lounge areas, cafés, and dedicated pet-friendly facilities. Its convenient location makes it attractive for both comfortable living and rental investment.
projects.desc_adora_rawai:
Adora — Rawai is a modern tropical development focused on comfort, privacy, and functional layouts.

Located in southern Phuket near Rawai and Nai Harn beaches and key area attractions, the project is suitable for both living and investment with solid rental potential. It is ideal for peaceful living.
projects.desc_sierra_bang_tao:
Sierra — Bang Tao is a contemporary residential project by a reliable developer in the center of Cherng Talay, near Porto de Phuket, Boat Avenue, and Laguna Phuket.

The development offers resort-style facilities, including a rooftop pool, fitness center, coworking space, pet area, and 24-hour security. Bang Tao, Surin, and Layan beaches are 10–15 minutes away, while Phuket International Airport is approximately 35 minutes by car.
projects.desc_villa_kirara_bang_tao:
Villa Kirara — Bang Tao is a modern villa project with private pools, located in a quiet hillside area of Cherng Talay, close to HeadStart International School, Boat Avenue, Laguna Phuket, and Bang Tao, Surin, and Layan beaches.

The project consists of 37 stylish pool villas with landscaped grounds. Its peaceful atmosphere and convenient location make it an excellent choice for family living and investment.
projects.desc_coralina_kamala:
Coralina — Kamala is a modern pet-friendly condominium in the prestigious Kamala area, just 10 minutes from the beach, suitable for both living and investment.

The complex features resort-style facilities, including swimming pools, fitness and yoga zones, spa, children’s and pet areas, coworking spaces, and 24-hour security. Its convenient location provides easy access to central Kamala, Patong, and the Laguna Phuket complex.
